import com.evil.System;

// An explicit import rebinding the simple name System must fail closed: the
// scoped spelling counts only when System is the implicit java.lang binding.
class SystemLoggerImportDecoy {
    private static final System.Logger log = System.getLogger("x");

    void decoyDoesNotReport() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.log(System.Logger.Level.ERROR, "failed", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
